verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I’m in need I call on the lord And he hears me, yes He helps me He’s faithful and true, won’t forget his own My companion, my best friend The only true God There is no one greater A wonderful saviour, Jesus The lion of Judah

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our God is tremendous His words never faileth He walks through the fire just to save a sinner Yes He is almighty, He sends his angels to guide me There is nothing to powerful our God cannot handle Our God in simplicity revealed in you and me He comes from His glory and gives us the victory The greatest love story
